lead: Figures on this page are verified against the sources below.

sources.label: Coriolis
sources.what: Interactive outfitting & build planner, preloaded for this ship — used to lay out the heavy mining-and-tank fit and confirm slot sizes.

sources.label: Elite Dangerous (official)
sources.what: Frontier's official Type-10 Defender ship page — manufacturer specs, hull profile, and the ship render used on this page.

sources.label: EDCD coriolis-data
sources.what: Ship slot layout, hardpoint/internal counts, armour and mass figures behind the mining build.

sources.label: Inara — Type-10 Defender
sources.what: Ship-specific stats, internal layout, cargo capacity and shipyard pricing for the cost figures.

sources.label: Fandom — Type-10 Defender
sources.what: Lakon hull profile, armour rating, and the ship's large-pad multipurpose role context.
